rationale: The cited paper appears in a single literature-review list of prior consumption studies, where it is briefly described as work on leisure activity time allocation and expertise. The citing paper does not use it to build specific hypotheses, construct its dynamic utility/state-transition model, define measures, or interpret key empirical findings. Core methodological grounding is instead tied to other dynamic structural references (especially Huang, Khwaja, and Sudhir 2015), so this citation functions as background context rather than a meaningful building block.
